summary:
PROPHETIC VISIONS OF CIVIL UNREST AND ORGANIZED CRIME: Brandon describes a series of visions regarding intense civil unrest and the rise of organized crime as a resistance force in the United States. He recounts seeing a future where the mafia and the five families out of places like Little Italy, Chicago, and Boston rise up to fight against Sharia law and the influence of the Islamic Brotherhood. Brandon claims this turf war will make these crime syndicates appear as freedom fighters resisting the policies of a Mamdani, who is trying to turn New York into an Islamic republic. Furthermore, Brandon details visions of severe rioting, the burning of churches and Trump-branded buildings, and a new civil war dividing the North and South with modern weaponry, emphasizing that far-right groups will be falsely blamed for the violence.

TECHNOLOGICAL ADVANCEMENTS AND GLOBAL THREATS: Brandon outlines several global and technological threats, warning of dangerous advancements in artificial intelligence and quantum computing. He states that while near-future medical breakthroughs might cure diseases like cancer and Alzheimer's, these innovations are designed to make the public blindly trust a new digital beast system. Brandon also speaks about China developing microwave satellites capable of destroying Starlink and building asteroid warning systems, which he links to a vision of a massive asteroid striking Earth in 2027. Additionally, he expresses concern over new internet regulations in Europe and Canada, describing a vision of a demon wrapping tentacles around the internet to suffocate First Amendment rights and establish socialist control over free speech.

MIDDLE EASTERN CONFLICTS AND INTERNATIONAL RELATIONS: Brandon pivots to geopolitical tensions, specifically focusing on the Middle East and the looming threat of an Antichrist spirit, which he associates with the Mahdi. He mentions the discovery of military tunnels in Lebanon and predicts an attack involving chemical weapons that will surpass the events of October 7th. Brandon urges prayers for Reza Pahlavi, the exiled Crown Prince of Iran, claiming to have seen a future assassination attempt against him. He also envisions the collapse of the current Iranian regime, portraying it as a desperate kamikaze state, while forecasting the rise of Iraq as a modern-day Babylon marked by oil corruption, pipeline deals, and a new leader resembling a young Saddam Hussein.

POLITICAL INTERCESSION AND PROTECTION OF THE TRUMP FAMILY: Brandon heavily emphasizes the need for targeted spiritual warfare and political intercession, urging followers to pray for specific conservative politicians and regions. He focuses on preventing a Democratic shift in Oklahoma, supporting Byron Donalds in Florida against a spiritual dragon, and pushing for the passage of the Clarity Act and the Save America Act to secure the economy. Notably, Brandon claims that while Donald Trump is spiritually protected, his children and grandchildren—specifically Don Jr., Ivanka, Kai, Tiffany, Barron, and Eric are currently being tracked and targeted by malicious actors. He calls for a hedge of protection around the Trump family, Supreme Court judges, and the nation's emergency response systems, warning of future disruptions and a potential Great Depression dust bowl scenario around 2027.

THE RISE OF THE CHURCH AND SPIRITUAL WARFARE: Brandon concludes his message by calling for a massive spiritual awakening and a unified mobilization of the Christian church. He references a historical vision by Tommy Hicks, asserting that a giant, unified body of Christ will rise above denominational differences to combat the encroaching darkness. Brandon teaches his audience about the authority of the believer, the importance of praying in tongues, and the necessity of true repentance to achieve this revival. He stresses the need to move beyond surface-level corporate prayer into deeper, Spirit-led intercession, encouraging his listeners to stand firm, practice the presence of God, and actively wage spiritual warfare over their specific cities and territories to counteract demonic influence.

How does the church pray for a person when they're underneath that? I hear that lady singing in the presence of Jehovah God Almighty, Prince of Peace. Troubles vanish, hearts are mended in the presence of the King. Father, we worship you. His ballroom that he's going to build is so beautiful. Every time I see him standing there on those steps, he's looking out at a big American flag. There's a massive American flag out there, and he is always looking at it because there's a driveway that goes through it. He's so proud of that accomplishment. It's all white, beautiful, and very presidential—very Trump. It's such a beautiful place. I can see the storm all around the building every single time I see it. And what's interesting is I always see those doves flying around it, circling in a whirlwind outside of this building. They are always riding and flying, and I see olive leaves around them. There are three of them: one up here, one in the middle, and one down here. They turn with olive leaves around them in the whirlwind outside of the ballroom, around the American flag. And I see those doves as I see a new ground zero coming. I see a storm. Lord, do you want me to keep pushing in this? I can push. Son, do you know when he's going to finish that thing? Does it say when they're supposed to be finished with that ballroom? 2027? I don't know why I see 2027. Some people are asking about September 2028. That would be right before he leaves. But there's something about the steps of 2027. I see another Great Depression; I see a dust bowl like the 1930s. I just had a glimpse of it, a flash of a dust bowl and a Great Depression. See, I never get in a rush. If you want to know how I do it, I just sit, listen, and pray. It's never frantic. You get quiet and you listen, and he shows you things. I'm focused on him, worshiping him. It's cultivation. It’s not frantic praying in tongues where you just scatter tongues all over the place. Shut up, pray, and listen. When you talk to him and you're friends with him, he shows you that which is to come. Right then, I saw the ballroom steps, and all of a sudden I see a Great Depression. I hear 'Great Depression, dust bowl.' I see tractors in a dust bowl. Drought. As I see a storm, I go, 'What?' I pray and he shows me things. You say, 'Was that your imagination?' No, I've learned it's the eye. That's how I see. The Lord shows me, and I've developed this over a long time, since I was about 14 years old. It's taken cultivation. I try to teach you things that nobody else is going to teach you at your church. You're not going to hear that in your little 30-minute sermonette and your little offering. They teach you a sugar-coated word, but I try to teach you cultivation. Pray, seek him. I had a flash again. I see the pink currency and I see Iraq. I see Babylon rising. I see palm trees and Rolls-Royces. I see Iraq becoming like Saudi Arabia again, a new era of time for Iraq coming around the oil. Something is being established with the oil in Iraq. A modern-day Babylon. I see a rising of Iraq as Iran crumbles. The prince is losing its grip. Iran is losing its grip upon Iraq and has trouble within. I see three faces in Iraq. One has a black mustache, is heavier set, and has a five-o'clock shadow. He looks like Saddam in his younger years before he looked crazy. A more established Iraq will rise in the days ahead over the oil. But there's still much corruption. I say they will set Iran back even further into the Stone Age, for an attack against their infrastructure is coming. It will be against their electric grid. Many are contemplating ground invasions with troops on the ground. They are debating using Saudi Arabia and Kuwait for ground invasions with boots on the ground. Battalions are arming the civilians. Iraq will rise up, but with much corruption because they are robbing the people with the HCL. There is great corruption. The Lord said corruption. I see Iran in the stone age in some areas. It is trying to get other nations around there to step in and help. It's trying to get Turkey to help and Syria. It's the art of the deal with the oil. The art of the deal concerning the strait. That's what I'm hearing. If you all jump in and help, it will be the art of the deal and re-establishing a safer area for all of us. It's a denuclearization of Iran. It's an art of the deal with Saudi Arabia, the oil, and the strait. It's alliances and an end. I see them trying to cut the cord to the internet, the underwater cables concerning Iran. I hear them threatening to cut underwater cables. Iran threatened it. It's about the internet. They don't have the means to do it; it's a lot of threats. It's too deep. You know the word kamikaze? It's to the point of kamikaze, to the point of desperation. I hear to the point of kamikaze. They're hitting a desperation point. This is a very scary point. I see them desperately trying to bring forth a Mahdi. We must do this. I see them trying to strike Israel. They have Israel in their sights. I see it like one of those little things that has a spin wheel on it, like a View-Master you put on your face as a kid.
